---
title: "Contact"
---

I'm happy to hear from you.

**Email** — nidhi&nbsp;\[at\]&nbsp;econschool.in

**Department**

Division of Social Science\
New York University Abu Dhabi\
Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates

**Around the web**

- [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nidhi-jain-b33072255/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/nidhijain1705)


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Email is best
The best way to reach me is via email. The address is written as `nidhi [at] econschool.in` rather than a clickable link to cut down on automated scraping.
:::
